objective: Consolidate PluginRuntime and migrate Syncthing monitor to a pure state machine
design_decisions: Extracted Syncthing lifecycle flags into a pure state machine mapped by exhaustive switch to reduce size budget and prevent impossible states.
Centralized component reset functions into a single injected PluginRuntime to prevent state bleed across unmounts.
Converted AutoSyncStatusSurface, AutoSyncStatusBrowserView, and SettingsMutationController into factories that store their state in closure, injected via PluginRuntime.
results: Global imports reduced and test stability improved.
No behavioral regressions introduced in the UI or syncthing backend.
